description:
2025 Porsche 911 Carrera, 3.0 TC F6 RWD, 388bhp, 8 Speed PDK. AED 629,000 or AED 9,854 / Month with a 20% Down payment for 5 Years. 
 - Mileage only 8,233 KM's - Porsche Warranty valid until 26th November 2026 (Extendable) - GCC specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Aero Kit - Full PPF - Gentian Blue Metallic - Electric Slide/Tilt Sunroof in Glass - Sports Exhaust System - 20/21" RS Spyder Wheels in Darksilver (Satin) - Porsche Active Suspension Management - Apple Carplay - Sports Chrono Package - HD-Matrix LED Headlights - Surround View with Active Parking Support - Cruise Control - 2-Zone Automatic Climate Control - Window Trim in Black - Ambient Lighting
